'''lojashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoic|zoic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoic|zoic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lojashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojashithi|lojashithi]] || [[word:lojashiji|lojashiji]] || [[word:lojashishi|lojashishi]] || [[word:lojashiki|lojashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojashuthuthu|lojashuthuthu]] || [[word:lojashujuju|lojashujuju]] || [[word:lojashushushu|lojashushushu]] || [[word:lojashukuku|lojashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojashuthu|lojashuthu]] || [[word:lojashuju|lojashuju]] || [[word:lojashushu|lojashushu]] || [[word:lojashuku|lojashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojashufthuf|lojashufthuf]] || [[word:lojashufjuf|lojashufjuf]] || [[word:lojashufshuf|lojashufshuf]] || [[word:lojashufkuf|lojashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojashethe|lojashethe]] || [[word:lojasheje|lojasheje]] || [[word:lojasheshe|lojasheshe]] || [[word:lojasheke|lojasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojashothotho|lojashothotho]] || [[word:lojashojojo|lojashojojo]] || [[word:lojashoshosho|lojashoshosho]] || [[word:lojashokoko|lojashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojashotho|lojashotho]] || [[word:lojashojo|lojashojo]] || [[word:lojashosho|lojashosho]] || [[word:lojashoko|lojashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojashofthof|lojashofthof]] || [[word:lojashofjof|lojashofjof]] || [[word:lojashofshof|lojashofshof]] || [[word:lojashofkof|lojashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfthĂŻf|lojashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfjĂŻf|lojashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfshĂŻf|lojashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfkĂŻf|lojashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lojashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lojashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lojashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lojashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfthĂŻf|lojashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfjĂŻf|lojashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfshĂŻf|lojashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfkĂŻf|lojashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfthĂŻf|lojashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfjĂŻf|lojashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfshĂŻf|lojashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojashĂŻfkĂŻf|lojashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojashĂŠthĂŠ|lojashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lojashĂŠjĂŠ|lojashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lojashĂŠshĂŠ|lojashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lojashĂŠkĂŠ|lojashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojashathatha|lojashathatha]] || [[word:lojashajaja|lojashajaja]] || [[word:lojashashasha|lojashashasha]] || [[word:lojashakaka|lojashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojashatha|lojashatha]] || [[word:lojashaja|lojashaja]] || [[word:lojashasha|lojashasha]] || [[word:lojashaka|lojashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojashafthaf|lojashafthaf]] || [[word:lojashafjaf|lojashafjaf]] || [[word:lojashafshaf|lojashafshaf]] || [[word:lojashafkaf|lojashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lojashasha|lojashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojashĂ«sha|lojashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojashrosha|lojashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojashmusha|lojashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojashyasha|lojashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojashnkshĂ«sha|golojashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojashnkrosha|golojashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojashnkmusha|golojashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojashnkyasha|golojashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lojajashasha|lojajashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojajashĂ«sha|lojajashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojajashrosha|lojajashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojajashmusha|lojajashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojajashyasha|lojajashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojajashnkshĂ«sha|golojajashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojajashnkrosha|golojajashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojajashnkmusha|golojajashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojajashnkyasha|golojajashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lejĂŠshasha|lejĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lejĂŠshĂ«sha|lejĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lejĂŠshrosha|lejĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lejĂŠshmusha|lejĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lejĂŠshyasha|lejĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golejĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|golejĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golejĂŠshnkrosha|golejĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golejĂŠshnkmusha|golejĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golejĂŠshnkyasha|golejĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lojfashasha|lojfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojfashĂ«sha|lojfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojfashrosha|lojfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojfashmusha|lojfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojfashyasha|lojfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojfashnkshĂ«sha|golojfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojfashnkrosha|golojfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojfashnkmusha|golojfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojfashnkyasha|golojfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
